sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Dash
special_mechanics.description: Characters can dash back and forth by pressing L and R buttons

special_mechanics.name: Ki Charging
special_mechanics.description: Players can charge Ki gauge by holding Y and B buttons to unleash Ki blast attack

special_mechanics.name: Counterattack
special_mechanics.description: Ability to counterattack special moves (new to sequel)

special_mechanics.name: Meteor Combos
special_mechanics.description: Consecutive attack chains available for most characters

special_mechanics.name: Water Arena Physics
special_mechanics.description: New water-based arenas with modified movement physics

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. This is a fighting game, not a platformer, so traditional movement physics (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are not primary design parameters. Sources contain gameplay mechanics descriptions but no quantified physics values.
sources_used: wikipedia - Dragon Ball Z: Super Butōden 2 (Gameplay section)
